mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN DEAL_STATUS = 'ACTIVE' OR DEAL_STATUS IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS activeCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN DEAL_STATUS = 'COMPLETE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completeCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN BADGE_TYPE = 'RECOMMEND' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recommendCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN BADGE_TYPE = 'URGENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS urgentCnt FROM TB_PROPERTY WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(RGT_DTM) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS todayCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN REPLY_YN = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unansweredCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(RGT_DTM, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS monthCnt, COUNT(*) AS totalCnt FROM TB_BBS_POST WHERE BRD_CD = '3ccd942dfcbf11f08771908d6ec6e544' AND DEL_YN = 'N'

SELECT A.PROP_CD, A.PROP_NM, A.DEAL_TYPE, A.SELL_PRICE, A.DEPOSIT, A.MONTHLY_RENT, A.DEAL_STATUS, B.CAT_NM, DATE_FORMAT(A.RGT_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS rgtDtm FROM TB_PROPERTY A LEFT JOIN TB_PROP_CATEGORY B ON A.CAT_CD = B.CAT_CD AND B.SUB_CAT_CD = '00' WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.RGT_DTM DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT A.PROP_CD, A.PROP_NM, A.VIEW_CNT, A.ADDRESS, B.CAT_NM FROM TB_PROPERTY A LEFT JOIN TB_PROP_CATEGORY B ON A.CAT_CD = B.CAT_CD AND B.SUB_CAT_CD = '00' WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND (A.DEAL_STATUS = 'ACTIVE' OR A.DEAL_STATUS IS NULL) ORDER BY A.VIEW_CNT DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT PST_CD, PST_NM, RGT_USR_NM, RGT_PHONE, REPLY_YN, DATE_FORMAT(RGT_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS rgtDtm FROM TB_BBS_POST WHERE BRD_CD = '3ccd942dfcbf11f08771908d6ec6e544' AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY RGT_DTM DESC LIMIT 10
